name: Asus Prime X870-P CSM
highlights: ASUS PRIME X870-P-CSM is an ATX motherboard powered by the AMD X870 chipset, supporting the latest AMD Ryzen™ 9000, 8000, and 7000 Series processors with DDR5 memory up to 256GB
It offers next-gen connectivity including dual USB4® Type-C®, PCIe 5
Designed for performance and durability, it features ASUS 5X Protection III, Q-Design enhancements, and Aura Sync RGB support
description: Asus Prime X870-P CSM Price in Pakistan Category Details Model PRIME X870-P-CSM CPU Support AMD Socket AM5 – Ryzen™ 9000 / 8000 / 7000 Series Chipset AMD X870 Memory 4× DDR5 DIMM slots, up to 256GB, up to 8000+ MT/s (OC), ECC & Non-ECC, dual channel, EXPO™ & AEMP supported Graphics Output 1× HDMI 2.1 (4K@60Hz), 2× USB4® Type-C® (DisplayPort 1.4a alt mode) Expansion Slots – 1× PCIe 5.0 x16 (Ryzen 9000/7000) – 1× PCIe 4.0 x16 (Ryzen 8000) – 2× PCIe 4.0 x16 (x1 mode, chips
